data.content: Plan review approved. The 7-step implementation plan is complete, technically feasible, and well-scoped. It correctly addresses: CLI subtree split to manage cli.rs size, new module for per-tool path resolution with table-driven tests, separation of deployed skill assets from workflow prompts, interactive prompt reuse, doctor extraction and extension, and three-layer test strategy. Risks around path semantics and file coupling are adequately mitigated. No invariant violations found. Ready for implementation.
